data.title: How do I undo the most recent local commits in Git?
data.acceptedAnswer: Undo a commit & redoCopy$ git commit -m"Something terribly misguided"# (0: Your Accident)$ git reset HEAD~# (1)# === If you just want to undo the commit, stop here!
